person.name: Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm

memoryArtifacts.headline: Coat of Arms for Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, nr. 29

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
In 1380 sealed King Valdemar's hand-fixing, and was then a knight, in 1368 was among the knights and squires who joined Counts Henrik and Claus' confederation against King Valdemar, in 1369 was fiance for Peder Iversen Lykke, in 1373 committed himself to King Valdemar to build it castle and fortress (Ø. Han Herred), which had been burned down in the last time of rebellion and feud. Sealed 1377 King Olaf's capture. Had died in 1388 when his widow, Mrs. Kirstine af Aagaard (de Ager) sold all her property in V. Assels to Dueholm Kloster (Morsø S. Herred). Source: https://finnholbek.dk/getperson.php?personID=I2909&tree=2

Abstract from:
https://www.adelsvapen.com/genealogi/Gyllenstierna_af_Svaneholm_nr_29#TAB_1B

Niels Erikssen the High, to Aagaard and Restrup, died before 1388. Knight. Married to Christina af Aagaard .

Children :

Eric Nielsen. Knight and Councillor. 
Peder Nielsen. National Council
Knud Nielsen. Knight and Councillor. 
Catrine Nielsdatter, married to Strange Pedersen ( Strangesen )
Bugge Nielsen.
Henrik Nielsen.
Susanne Nielsdatter. Married to Niels Iversen ( Rosenkrantz )
Inger Nielsdatter. Married to Niels Timmesen ( Rosenkrantz )
NN Nielsdatter. Married to Elef Elefsen ( Picture )
Gotskalk Nielsen.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm於大約1340年出生在丹麥時，他的父親Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm32歲，母親Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo23歲。他於大約1361年與Christina af Aagaard在丹麥迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年在丹麥維斯亞藍德林斯泰德享年49歲，埋葬在丹麥索洛阿爾斯泰德索洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm于大约1340年出生在丹麦时，他的父亲Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm32岁，母亲Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo23岁。他于大约1361年与Christina af Aagaard在丹麦迪斯泰德維斯特 韓凱特盧普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年在丹麦維斯亞藍德林斯泰德享年49岁，埋葬在丹麦索洛阿爾斯泰德索洛。

nameMeanings.name: Erikssen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Anders, Nils, Per, Alf, Algot, Alvar, Bjorn, Elof, Knut, Mats.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Erik, from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ). Compare Erickson , Ericsson , and Erikson .

variants.name: Erikson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Anders, Nils, Astrid, Berndt, Iver, Karsten, Lars, Lennart, Lief, Thor.  German Gerhart, Ernst.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish   Eriksson  . This is also an Americanized form of the Norwegian, Danish, and North German cognate   Eriksen  . Compare   Erekson   and   Erickson  .

variants.name: Erickson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Thor, Nils, Lars, Sven, Lief, Anders, Lennart, Iver, Elof, Erland.

Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Ericsson and Eriksson , Norwegian, Danish, and North German Eriksen and Erichsen , or of any other Scandinavian or North German patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr, which is composed of ei ‘ever, always’ (or a shortened form of ein ‘one, only’) + rík ‘power’. Compare Ericksen , Ericson , and Erikson .
English (Lancashire): patronymic from the Middle English male personal name Eric (with the same etymology as 1 above) + son.

variants.name: Erekson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Eriksson or of any other Scandinavian patronymic from a personal name derived from Old Norse Eiríkr (see Erickson ).

variants.name: Ericsson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Sven, Anders, Britt, Gunvor, Johan, Kerstin, Tor.
Swedish: variant of   Eriksson  . Compare   Erickson   and   Ericson  .

nameMeanings.name: Niels
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm was born about 1340, in Denmark, his father, Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, was 32 and his mother, Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, was 23. He married Christina af Aagaard about 1361, in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1388, in Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Denmark, at the age of 49, and was buried in Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm est né environ 1340, à Danemark, son père, Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Christina af Aagaard environ 1361, à Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1388, à Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danemark, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm um 1340 in Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm 32 und seine Mutter Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo 23. Er hat um 1361 in Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dänemark Christina af Aagaard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1388 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dänemark und wurde in Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm è nato il circa 1340 nel Danimarca, il suo padre, Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Christina af Aagaard circa 1361, nel Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1388, nel Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Danimarca, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholmが約1340年にデンマークで生まれた時，父Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholmは32歳，母Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelboは23歳であった。約1361年にデンマークスイステドベスター ハンケットルップでChristina af Aagaardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年にデンマークベストスジaeランドリングステドで49歳で死去し，デンマークソルoアルステドソルoにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm(이)가 대략 1340년 덴마크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1361년 덴마크 스이스테드 베스터 핸 케트루프에서 Christina af Aagaard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 덴마크 베스츠jae랜드 링스테드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 소o 알스테드 소o에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Dinamarca, seu pai, Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina af Aagaard aproximadamente 1361, em Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1388, em Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm родился около 1340 г. в местности Дания, его отцу по имени Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina af Aagaard около 1361 г. в местности кеттруп, вестир хань, тистед, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1388 г. в местности рингстед, весцджaeлланд, Дания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности сорo, алстед, сорo, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Niels Erikssen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm nació aproximadamente 1340, en Dinamarca, su papá, Erik Nielsen Gyllenstierna af Svaneholm, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Cecilia Pedersdatter Vendelbo, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Christina af Aagaard aproximadamente 1361, en Kettrup, Vester Han, Thisted, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1388, en Ringsted, Vestsjælland, Dinamarca, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Sorø, Alsted, Sorø, Dinamarca.
